endpoints.label: Default :Id
endpoints.description: Marks a specific address as the user's default shipping address.

endpoints.label: :Id Address
endpoints.description: Updates an existing address on the user's account.

endpoints.label: :Id Address
endpoints.description: Removes a saved address from the user's account.

endpoints.label: List Address
endpoints.description: Returns all saved addresses for the currently logged-in user.

endpoints.label: Create Address
endpoints.description: Saves a new shipping address to the user's account.

endpoints.label: List Callback
endpoints.description: Completes the OAuth or email verification flow and redirects the user.

endpoints.label: Check Email Auth
endpoints.description: Checks whether an email address is already registered on the platform.

endpoints.label: Delete Account Auth
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes the user's account, listings, and all associated data.

endpoints.label: Register Auth
endpoints.description: Creates a new user account and sends a verification email.

endpoints.label: List Block
endpoints.description: List all members blocked by the authenticated user

endpoints.label: Delete Block
endpoints.description: Unblock a member by removing the block record

endpoints.label: Expiry :Id
endpoints.description: Extends the hold timer on a cart item to keep it reserved longer.

endpoints.label: :Id Cart
endpoints.description: Removes a single item from the user's cart.

endpoints.label: List Count
endpoints.description: Returns the number of items currently in the user's cart.

endpoints.label: Merge Cart
endpoints.description: Merges items browsed as a guest into the user's cart after sign-in.

endpoints.label: List Cart
endpoints.description: Returns all items currently in the user's cart.

endpoints.label: Create Cart
endpoints.description: Adds a listing to the user's cart and places a temporary hold on it.

endpoints.label: Delete Cart
endpoints.description: Removes all items from the user's cart at once.

endpoints.label: Validate Cart
endpoints.description: Checks that all cart items are still available and valid before checkout.

endpoints.label: List Offers Expiry
endpoints.description: Expire stale pending and accepted offers past their time windows

endpoints.label: List Price Drop
endpoints.description: Process price drop notifications and email watchers about reduced prices

endpoints.label: List Check
endpoints.description: Checks whether the current user has already flagged a specific item.

endpoints.label: Create Flag
endpoints.description: Submits a flag reporting a listing or user for review by the Nessi team.

endpoints.label: List Count
endpoints.description: Get the follower count for a member or shop

endpoints.label: List Following
endpoints.description: List members and shops the authenticated user follows

endpoints.label: Create Follow
endpoints.description: Follow a member or shop

endpoints.label: Delete Follow
endpoints.description: Unfollow a member or shop

endpoints.label: List Statu
endpoints.description: Check if the authenticated user follows a member or shop

endpoints.label: Accept :Token
endpoints.description: Accepts a shop invite via token and adds the user as a shop member.

endpoints.label: Duplicate :Id
endpoints.description: Creates a new draft listing copied from an existing one the seller owns.

endpoints.label: List :Id
endpoints.description: Returns the full details of a single listing, including photos.

endpoints.label: :Id Listing
endpoints.description: Updates the details of an existing listing owned by the seller.

endpoints.label: :Id Listing
endpoints.description: Permanently removes a listing and its photos from the seller's account.

endpoints.label: Status :Id
endpoints.description: Changes a listing's status — such as publishing, archiving, or marking it sold.

endpoints.label: View :Id
endpoints.description: Records a listing view and updates the user's recently-viewed history.

endpoints.label: List Autocomplete
endpoints.description: Returns quick search suggestions combining popular terms, listings, and categories.

endpoints.label: List Batch
endpoints.description: Fetches multiple listings by ID in a single request, useful for cart and watchlist displays.

endpoints.label: List Draft
endpoints.description: Returns all draft listings the seller has not yet published.

endpoints.label: Drafts Listing
endpoints.description: Creates a new blank draft listing ready for the seller to fill in.

endpoints.label: Drafts Listing
endpoints.description: Discards a draft listing that was never published.

endpoints.label: List Followed Seller
endpoints.description: Returns recent active listings from members and shops the user follows

endpoints.label: List Recommendation
endpoints.description: Returns personalized listing recommendations based on context such as similar items or seller listings.

endpoints.label: List Listing
endpoints.description: Returns a paginated list of active listings, with optional filters and sorting.

endpoints.label: Create Listing
endpoints.description: Creates a new listing draft for the seller, in either member or shop context.

endpoints.label: Search Suggestions Listing
endpoints.description: Records a search term to improve future autocomplete suggestions.

endpoints.label: List Search
endpoints.description: Full-text search for listings with filters for category, condition, price, and location.

endpoints.label: List Seller
endpoints.description: Returns the seller's own listings, optionally filtered by status.

endpoints.label: Delete Upload
endpoints.description: Removes a previously uploaded listing photo from storage.

endpoints.label: Upload Listing
endpoints.description: Uploads a photo for a listing, resizes it, and saves both full and thumbnail versions.

endpoints.label: Avatar Member
endpoints.description: Uploads and sets a new profile photo for the member's account.

endpoints.label: :Member Id Block
endpoints.description: Unblock a member to allow them to message you again

endpoints.label: Block Member
endpoints.description: Block a member to prevent them from messaging you

endpoints.label: Heartbeat Member
endpoints.description: Update the current user's last seen timestamp for online status

endpoints.label: Profile Member
endpoints.description: Update the authenticated member's profile text fields with content moderation

endpoints.label: List Seller Precondition
endpoints.description: Checks whether the member has any active listings that would block disabling seller mode.

endpoints.label: Toggle Seller Member
endpoints.description: Enables or disables seller mode on the member's account.

endpoints.label: Archive :Thread Id
endpoints.description: Archive a message thread

endpoints.label: List Message
endpoints.description: List messages in a thread with cursor-based pagination

endpoints.label: Messages :Thread Id
endpoints.description: Send a message in a thread (applies safety filter before storage)

endpoints.label: Read :Thread Id
endpoints.description: Mark a thread as read for the authenticated user or shop context

endpoints.label: List :Thread Id
endpoints.description: Get thread details including participants and context

endpoints.label: Upload :Thread Id
endpoints.description: Upload images in a message thread

endpoints.label: List Thread
endpoints.description: List the authenticated user's message threads with optional type filter

endpoints.label: Threads Messaging
endpoints.description: Create a new message thread between two members

endpoints.label: List Unread Count
endpoints.description: Get the total unread message count for the authenticated user or shop context

endpoints.label: Read :Id
endpoints.description: Mark a single notification as read

endpoints.label: Read All Notification
endpoints.description: Mark all notifications as read for the authenticated user

endpoints.label: List Notification
endpoints.description: List notifications for the authenticated user with pagination

endpoints.label: List Unread Count
endpoints.description: Get the unread notification count for the authenticated user

endpoints.label: Accept :Id
endpoints.description: Accept a pending offer as the seller

endpoints.label: Counter :Id
endpoints.description: Counter a pending offer with a new amount

endpoints.label: Decline :Id
endpoints.description: Decline a pending offer as the seller

endpoints.label: List :Id
endpoints.description: Get offer details including listing and participant info

endpoints.label: Create Offer
endpoints.description: Submit a new offer on a listing

endpoints.label: Merge Recently Viewed
endpoints.description: Merges a guest user's browsing history into their account after sign-in.

endpoints.label: List Recently Viewed
endpoints.description: Returns listings the user has recently viewed, for display on their dashboard.

endpoints.label: Delete Recently Viewed
endpoints.description: Clears the user's entire recently-viewed browsing history.

endpoints.label: Resend :InviteId
endpoints.description: Resends a shop invite email with a refreshed token and expiry.

endpoints.label: :InviteId Invite
endpoints.description: Revokes a pending shop invite so it can no longer be accepted.

endpoints.label: Invites :Id
endpoints.description: Sends a shop invite email to a new member with a specified role.

endpoints.label: List Invite
endpoints.description: Returns all pending and past invites for a shop.

endpoints.label: Role :MemberId
endpoints.description: Changes the role assigned to a shop member.

endpoints.label: :MemberId Member
endpoints.description: Removes a member from a shop, or allows a member to remove themselves.

endpoints.label: Members :Id
endpoints.description: Adds a member directly to a shop with a specified role, bypassing the invite flow.

endpoints.label: List Ownership Transfer
endpoints.description: Returns the pending ownership transfer request for a shop, if one exists.

endpoints.label: Ownership Transfer :Id
endpoints.description: Cancels a pending shop ownership transfer before it is accepted.

endpoints.label: Ownership :Id
endpoints.description: Initiates a shop ownership transfer by sending a confirmation email to the new owner.

endpoints.label: Profile :Id
endpoints.description: Update a shop's text fields (name, description) with content moderation

endpoints.label: List Role
endpoints.description: Returns the list of roles available to assign to members of a shop.

endpoints.label: :Id Shop
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes a shop and all its associated listings and assets.

endpoints.label: Avatar Shop
endpoints.description: Uploads and sets a new avatar image for a shop's profile.

endpoints.label: Hero Banner Shop
endpoints.description: Uploads and sets a new hero banner image displayed at the top of a shop's page.

endpoints.label: Accept :Token
endpoints.description: Accepts a shop ownership transfer, making the recipient the new owner.

endpoints.label: List :Token
endpoints.description: Looks up the details of a shop ownership transfer by its invite token.

endpoints.label: Create Shop
endpoints.description: Creates a new shop and registers the creator as its owner.

endpoints.label: Slug Shop
endpoints.description: Reserves a new URL slug for a shop, replacing the previous one.

endpoints.label: List :Listing Id
endpoints.description: Check if the authenticated user is watching a specific listing

endpoints.label: List Watchlist
endpoints.description: List all listings the authenticated user is watching

endpoints.label: Create Watchlist
endpoints.description: Watch a listing for the authenticated user

endpoints.label: Delete Watchlist
endpoints.description: Stop watching a listing for the authenticated user

endpoints.label: Stripe Webhook
endpoints.description: Receive and process incoming Stripe webhook events
